license_note: MBTI-based personality classification test. Please answer each question honestly.

questions.text: I enjoy meeting new people at parties and social gatherings.
I feel more comfortable and energized when I have time alone.
I like being around large groups of people and social interactions.
I prefer forming deep, meaningful relationships with a small group of people.
I tend to act first and think about consequences later.
I focus on concrete facts and practical realities.
I often think about future possibilities and potential.
I like to approach tasks systematically and accurately.
I enjoy trying new ideas and creative problem-solving.
I best understand things I can experience directly through my senses.
I make decisions based on logic and objective criteria.
I consider how my decisions affect others' feelings.
I tend to think critically and point out flaws.
I work hard to maintain harmonious relationships.
I value principles and rules, and act consistently.
I like making plans and following through with them.
I prefer keeping options open until the last moment.
I prefer an organized and structured lifestyle.
I am spontaneous and flexible in my approach to life.
I set goals and work steadily toward achieving them.
